tool_input.failure_reason: The tolerance metric `electrostatic_relative_error` is absent from results.json; only convergence/loading pass/fail/warn counters are present, so the <0.02 bound cannot be verified.
tool_input.rationale: The digest from results.json contains only summary counts for "convergence" (pass: 11, warn: 1, fail: 0) and "loading" (pass: 12, fail: 0). There is no field named `electrostatic_relative_error` anywhere in the digest, nor any per-structure energy values from BALL or Tinker to compute |ball_energy - tinker_energy| / |tinker_energy|. The digest header itself reports `metric_present: fail`. Without the actual metric values, I cannot verify the <0.02 tolerance. I also cannot escalate to Challenge because there is no specific observed relative error value in the digest that contradicts the bound — just unrelated convergence/loading counters.
